definitions: A verb tense that indicates an action that will be ongoing at a specific point in the future.
Used to describe an action that will be in progress over a period of time in the future.
Refers to an uncompleted action or event that will be happening at some future time.
examples: I will be working all day tomorrow.
They will be waiting for us when we arrive.
She will be studying for her exams next week.
At 10 PM tonight, he will be sleeping.
